a.xlink:title: users One row per human. Role (Tenant/Landlord/Admin) is NOT stored here — it lives in Keycloak. The same user can be a landlord (properties.LandlordId, leases.LandlordId) AND a tenant (leases.TenantId).

leases Created at invite ACCEPTANCE, not at invite creation. Multiple active leases per tenant are currently permitted; a single-active-lease invariant + partial unique index is a documented follow-up.

payments The 4 Receipt* and 5 Ocr* columns are two OPTIONAL 1:1 sub-entities embedded inline. 3NF-compliant (single-valued, functionally dependent on Id) but a candidate for extraction to a payment_receipts table — see review §5.

invites Carries PROPOSED lease terms + invitee identity. These mirror leases/users columns but are NOT redundant: an invite precedes both the User account and the Lease (both created on accept). See review §5.
failed_emails Dead-letter table: one row per email that exhausted Hangfire retries. Standalone — no FK (the recipient may not be a registered user).
